capacity_basis: double occupancy (HAL Fleet Specifications 'Capacity' row); 'Maximum Passengers' full-occupancy figure recorded in each ship's notes

ships.name: Koningsdam
features: World Stage two-deck theater with production shows
Music Walk: Rolling Stone Lounge, Billboard Onboard, B.B. King's Blues Club
Rudi's Sel de Mer and Tamarind specialty dining
Lido Pool with retractable glass roof and adults-only Sea View Pool
ships.notes: Maiden voyage Apr 8, 2016. Maximum Passengers 3,154. Crew 1,036. First Pinnacle-class ship.

ships.name: Nieuw Statendam
features: World Stage productions with LED stagecraft
Rolling Stone Lounge, Billboard Onboard, B.B. King's Blues Club
Morimoto By Sea, Sel de Mer and Tamarind specialty dining
Grand Dutch Cafe and Club Orange private dining
ships.notes: Maiden voyage Dec 5, 2018. Maximum Passengers 3,170. Crew 1,036.

ships.name: Rotterdam
features: World Stage theater with dynamic production shows
Rolling Stone Lounge, Billboard Onboard, B.B. King's Blues Club
Morimoto By Sea, Sel de Mer, Tamarind and Club Orange dining
Grand Dutch Cafe and Half Moon Bar
ships.notes: Maiden voyage August 1, 2021 (largest ship in the fleet by tonnage). Maximum Passengers 3,172. Crew 1,048.

ships.name: Eurodam
features: World Stage productions
Rolling Stone Lounge, Billboard Onboard and The Dam Band
Pinnacle Grill and Tamarind pan-Asian dining
Lido Pool with retractable glass roof, adults-only Sea View Pool, Retreat Cabanas
ships.notes: Maiden voyage Jul 1, 2008. Maximum Passengers 2,731. Crew 876. First Signature-class ship.

ships.name: Nieuw Amsterdam
features: World Stage productions
Rolling Stone Lounge, Billboard Onboard and The Dam Band
Pinnacle Grill and Tamarind specialty dining
Retreat Cabanas and Greenhouse Spa & Salon
ships.notes: Maiden voyage Jul 4, 2010. Maximum Passengers 2,735. Crew 874.

ships.name: Noordam
features: World Stage productions
Rolling Stone Lounge, Billboard Onboard and The Dam Band
Pinnacle Grill, Canaletto and Tamarind (select nights)
Explorer's Lounge and Library Cafe
ships.notes: Maiden voyage Feb 22, 2006. Maximum Passengers 2,596. Crew 811.

ships.name: Oosterdam
features: World Stage productions
Rolling Stone Lounge, Billboard Onboard and The Dam Band
Pinnacle Grill, Canaletto and Morimoto By Sea
Lido Pool with retractable glass roof and adults-only Sea View Pool
ships.notes: Maiden voyage Aug 3, 2003. Maximum Passengers 2,587. Crew 812.

ships.name: Westerdam
features: World Stage productions
Rolling Stone Lounge, Billboard Onboard and The Dam Band
Pinnacle Grill, Canaletto and Tamarind pan-Asian dining
Explorer's Lounge and Hydropool
ships.notes: Maiden voyage Apr 26, 2004. Maximum Passengers 2,587. Crew 812.

ships.name: Zuiderdam
features: World Stage productions
Rolling Stone Lounge, Billboard Onboard and The Dam Band
Pinnacle Grill, Canaletto and Morimoto By Sea
Gallery Bar and Explorer's Lounge
ships.notes: Maiden voyage Dec 14, 2002. Maximum Passengers 2,587. Crew 812. First Vista-class ship.

ships.name: Volendam
features: Wajang Theater productions and cinematic screenings
Pinnacle Grill, Canaletto and Morimoto By Sea
MIX lounge, Piano Bar and Library Cafe
Lanai staterooms (ocean-view with direct promenade access)
ships.notes: Maiden voyage Nov 12, 1999. Maximum Passengers 1,839. Crew 604. R-class; uses Wajang Theater rather than World Stage. 21 Lanai staterooms per Fleet Specifications.

ships.name: Zaandam
features: Wajang Theater productions and daily movies
Pinnacle Grill, Canaletto and Morimoto By Sea
MIX martini & champagne lounge and Piano Bar
Library Cafe and Thermal Suite
ships.notes: Maiden voyage May 6, 2000. Maximum Passengers 1,839. Crew 604. R-class; uses Wajang Theater rather than World Stage.

flag: All 11 ships have officially-sourced class, year, tonnage and guests. IMPORTANT: the official fleet-page 'Ships at a Glance' PDF (/content/dam/hal/inventory-assets/ships/at-a-glance/hal-ships-at-a-glance.pdf, updated 11/27/25) is a DINING/AMENITIES/ENTERTAINMENT comparison chart ONLY and contains NO tonnage/guests/year. Specs were instead taken from the official Holland America Line Fleet Specifications fact sheet PDF (newsroom press kit, effective date Nov 17, 2020) - authoritative and first-party, but ~5 years old; capacity/tonnage/year are stable but a fresh official fact sheet should be re-checked before publish. Features were read from each ship's official hollandamerica.com/en/us/cruise-ships/<ship> detail page. No prices recorded. No third-party sources used.
